text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it's been a year since we were last
here! Everything still feels the same, though, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The sound of the cicadas and the ocean waves
makes it feel sooo summery!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Let's have an absolutely buono time this year, too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, this year's sizzling summer camp
experience with Hishi Akebono gets off to a start!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: We should go to a fireworks show again this year!
